description: Install Flutter SDK and create the msm_app Flutter project with all required dependencies. Configure web/index.html for /app/ base href and PWA manifest.
steps: Clone Flutter stable SDK to /opt/flutter (depth 1) and add to PATH
Run flutter doctor to verify installation
Create Flutter project: flutter create msm_app --org in.msmsupermarket --platforms web,android,ios (run from /projects/sandbox/revathysupermarket/)

Replace pubspec.yaml dependencies section with all required packages: flutter_riverpod ^2.5.1, go_router ^14.0.0, dio ^5.4.3, cached_network_image ^3.3.1, flutter_secure_storage ^9.0.0, shared_preferences ^2.2.3, google_fonts ^6.2.1, shimmer ^3.0.0, smooth_page_indicator ^1.1.0, flutter_animate ^4.5.0, badges ^3.1.2, geolocator ^13.0.1, flutter_map ^7.0.0, latlong2 ^0.9.0
Add dev_dependencies: build_runner, freezed, freezed_annotation, json_serializable, json_annotation, riverpod_generator, riverpod_annotation, riverpod_lint
Run flutter pub get in msm_app/
Configure msm_app/web/index.html: set <base href='/app/'>, add PWA manifest link to /manifest.webmanifest, set theme-color meta to #FF6600
Run flutter analyze to confirm zero errors
acceptance_criteria: Flutter SDK is installed and flutter --version works
msm_app/ directory exists with valid Flutter project structure
flutter pub get completes without errors
web/index.html has base href /app/, manifest link, and theme-color #FF6600
verification: Run: export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/revathysupermarket/msm_app && flutter analyze
findings: Flutter 3.44.3 installed at /opt/flutter. The base href in web/index.html must stay as $FLUTTER_BASE_HREF placeholder - the --base-href /app/ build flag replaces it at build time. Web build produces wasm dry-run warnings about flutter_secure_storage_web using dart:html (non-breaking, JS compilation still works). All flutter commands require: export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH
